name: blogapp
_comment: npm run build:client — builds frontend only
npm run dev — runs server + client in parallel via concurrently
npm run dev:tui — runs custom TUI launcher
npm run dev:client — frontend only (Vite dev server)
npm run start — runs backend in production
npm run start:prod — builds the app and starts the production server
npm install --prefix client / server — install packages for specific part

scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run start
